arts.ttl: Jim Goodwin silences Celtic-daft mates as Dundee United boss reveals 2 key factors in battling draw
arts.sum: Goodwin has plenty of Celtic supporting family and friends and he's happy to have shut them up

arts.ttl: Former Brendan Rodgers favourite delivers inch-perfect assist to help sink Man Utd
arts.sum: One of Brendan Rodgers' former first-team Celtic stars helped sink Manchester United with a wicked assist at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Aiden McGeady baffled by Kyogo as he makes Adam Idah claim after Celtic's draw v Dundee United
arts.sum: You could argue that the best chance of the game fell to Kyogo in the second half when he was one-v-one, but he hardly made contact with the ball. In truth, if Brendan Rodgers is honest with himself, then he can’t have many complaints because Celtic deserved to draw 0-0 with Dundee United .

arts.ttl: Nicolas Kuhn faces nervous Celtic injury return wait as Brendan Rodgers crosses fingers over star man
arts.sum: Kuhn missed Celtic's draw with Dundee United due to a knee problem but Rodgers hopes it won't be long-term

arts.ttl: 'Get him to MLS pronto' – Celtic star draws ire of pundits and supporters alike
arts.sum: Pundits and supporters have spoken passionately about one struggling Celt after their Dundee United display

arts.ttl: Celtic rue missed chances as stubborn Dundee United hold league leaders
arts.sum: Celtic dropped Premiership points for only the second time this season in a goalless draw against a diligent Dundee United. In his first match at Tannadice as Celtic’s manager, Brendan Rodgers watched his much-changed side dominate possession for the vast majority of the game but fail to find a way past a resolute defence. It was the first points dropped since a 2-2 draw against Aberdeen in October and means Celtic finished the day nine points ahead of Rangers at the top. Celtic remain unbeaten domestically as they prepare for home games against Motherwell and St Johnstone before the Old Firm derby at Rangers on 2 January. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton sends clear message about Celtic's 'fringe players' after draw against Dundee United
arts.sum: Chris Sutton says it ‘wasn’t easy’ for Celtic’s fringe players against Dundee United Sutton acknowledged that the Bhoys ‘weren’t good enough’ in the final third, but he also seemed to sympathise with those bench players, as he posted on Twitter.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers talks up two 'excellent' performers despite Celtic's stalemate vs Dundee United
arts.sum: Unfortunately for the Celtic boss, his players failed to test Dundee United to the standard that the Hoops fans are used to and despite a late attacking flurry towards the end of the game, a 0-0 draw was played out much to the frustration of Rodgers . Brendan Rodgers hails two Celtic performers after Dundee United stalemate

arts.ttl: Rodgers makes 'it looked like we couldn't score' admission following United stalemate
arts.sum: Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers addressed his side's performance against Dundee United at Tannadice

arts.ttl: Celtic drop points in stalemate at stubborn Dundee Utd
arts.sum: Celtic dropped points for only the second time this season and missed the chance to move 11 clear of second-placed Rangers in a goalless draw at Dundee United.
